description: Insight briefing content for Ferni's handoffs and cross-team coordination

from_maya: Maya mentioned you've been working on some habits - I'd love to hear how that's going
I heard you and Maya were diving into some routines. What's on your mind now?
Maya shared a bit about what you've been building together. How are you feeling about it?

I know you were deep in the data with Peter. What's coming up for you now?

I heard you and Alex were tackling a conversation. What's on your mind now?

I know you and Jordan were mapping out some milestones. How are you feeling?

I heard you and Nayan were reflecting on some meaningful things
Nayan shared you've been doing some important inner work. How are you?
generic: I'm back with you now. What's on your mind?
Good to reconnect. How are you doing?
I'm here. What would you like to explore?

patterns: There's a pattern I've been seeing...
Something I've picked up on over our conversations...
connections: This reminds me of something you mentioned before...
I see a connection to what you were working on with...

acknowledging_other_work: I know you've been putting in work with the team

I've been following your progress across our conversations
building_on_insights: Building on what we've discovered together...
Adding to what the team has been helping with...

team_coordination: Maya might have some thoughts on the habit side of this
Peter could help dig into the data here

detailed_handoff: Let me bring you up to speed. {context}
I want to make sure we're on the same page. {context}
returning_user: Welcome back! Last time we talked about {topic}
Good to see you again. We left off at {topic}
